topic: Understanding Introductions and Conclusions in Arguments
title: Starting and Ending Your Arguments

questions.question: What does "physical exertions" mean?
options: food that is prepared quickly and can be taken away to eat
questions.explanation: "physical exertions" means: doing exercise or physical activity

questions.question: What does "food to go / fast food" mean?
options: food that is prepared quickly and can be taken away to eat
questions.correct_answer: food that is prepared quickly and can be taken away to eat
questions.explanation: "food to go / fast food" means: food that is prepared quickly and can be taken away to eat

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Introductions tell the reader the ______ of the argument and what to expect.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Introductions tell the reader the topic of the argument and what to expect."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Conclusions summarise the main points and give a final thought.
Both introductions and conclusions should be interesting to keep the reader engaged.
Introductions tell the reader the topic of the argument and what to expect.
It has no special meaning in writing.
questions.correct_answer: Conclusions summarise the main points and give a final thought.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Conclusions summarise the main points and give a final thought." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: It has no special meaning in writing.
Conclusions summarise the main points and give a final thought.
Both introductions and conclusions should be interesting to keep the reader engaged.
Introductions tell the reader the topic of the argument and what to expect.
questions.correct_answer: Both introductions and conclusions should be interesting to keep the reader engaged.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Both introductions and conclusions should be interesting to keep the reader engaged." is one of the key things to remember.
